features.title: Why Choose PDFOrca?
features.subtitle: Built around speed, privacy, and a clean workflow — without locking essentials behind a paywall.

security.title: Military-Grade Security
security.description: All files are automatically deleted after processing. We use end-to-end encryption and never store your documents.

speed.title: Blazing Fast Processing
speed.description: Leverage parallel processing and WebAssembly for ultra-fast PDF operations. Process large files in seconds.

ai.title: AI-Powered Features
ai.description: Use AI to summarize PDFs, extract key points, generate titles, and more. Powered by advanced language models.

multilingual.title: Multi-Language Support
multilingual.description: Full support for English and Hindi, with more languages coming soon. Optimized for regional search keywords.

browser.title: Browser Processing
browser.description: Process files directly in your browser for maximum privacy. No server upload required for basic operations.

parallel.title: Parallel Processing
parallel.description: Use Web Workers and serverless functions to process multiple files simultaneously. No queues, no waiting.

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.description: Process up to 10 files at once. Merge, convert, or compress multiple documents simultaneously — save time on every task.

no_signup.title: No Registration Required
no_signup.description: Use every tool instantly without creating an account. No sign-up walls, no email verification — just upload and go.

stats.avg_time_desc: Lightning-fast processing using parallel computing and optimized algorithms.
stats.available_desc: Use every tool any time, from any browser, on any device.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions

q1.question: Is PDFOrca free to use?
q1.answer: Yes! All basic PDF tools are completely free. We offer premium features for advanced needs.

q2.question: Are my files secure?
q2.answer: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption and automatically delete files after 1 hour.

q3.question: What file sizes are supported?
q3.answer: We support files up to 100MB for free users and up to 2GB for premium users.

q4.question: Do I need to install any software?
q4.answer: No installation required. PDFOrca works entirely in your browser.

q5.question: Can I use it on mobile?
q5.answer: Yes! Our website is fully responsive and works perfectly on all mobile devices.

q6.question: How fast is the processing?
q6.answer: Most operations complete in under 2 seconds for average-sized files. We use parallel processing, Web Workers, and optimized algorithms for maximum speed.

q7.question: What PDF tools do you offer?
q7.answer: We offer 14+ tools including merge, split, compress, convert (PDF to Word, Excel, PPT, JPG), rotate, protect, unlock, watermark, page numbering, organize, and AI-powered summarization.

q8.question: Do you have an API for developers?
q8.answer: Yes, we offer a comprehensive REST API for developers. You can integrate our PDF processing capabilities directly into your applications with detailed documentation and SDKs.

faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about PDFOrca.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your PDF Workflow?
cta.subtitle: Every tool is free, requires no sign-up, and processes your files privately in seconds.

footer.description: A focused PDF toolkit you can use without signing up. Files are processed over HTTPS and removed after the job is done.
footer.auto_delete: Files are automatically deleted after processing. We never store your documents.
footer.supported_formats: PDFOrca supports: PDF, DOC, DOCX, PPT, PPTX, XLS, XLSX, and JPG. Maximum file size: 100MB per file.
footer.https_notice: This service uses secure HTTPS encryption. All processing happens in secure environments.

merge_pdf.title: Merge PDF
merge_pdf.description: Combine multiple PDF files into a single document. Upload your files, arrange them in order, and download the merged result.
merge_pdf.seo_h1: Merge PDF Files Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Is PDF merging free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our PDF merger is completely free with no hidden charges. You can merge unlimited files without registration.

seo_faq.question: Can I reorder pages before merging?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can drag and drop files to rearrange them in any order before merging. The merged PDF will follow your specified order.

seo_faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: You can merge PDFs up to 100MB each for free. For larger files, consider using our premium plan.

seo_faq.question: How many PDFs can I merge at once?
seo_faq.answer: You can merge up to 20 PDF files at once. If you need to merge more, simply process them in batches.

seo_faq.question: Is my data secure?
seo_faq.answer: Absolutely. All files are processed securely with end-to-end encryption and are automatically deleted from our servers after 1 hour.

merge_pdf.step2: Arrange them in the desired order

merge_pdf.tips_order: Drag files up or down to arrange them in the desired order

compress_pdf.title: Compress PDF
compress_pdf.description: Reduce PDF file size while maintaining quality. Choose compression level based on your needs.
compress_pdf.seo_h1: Compress PDF Files Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Is PDF compression safe?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, compression only optimizes images and removes unnecessary metadata. Your document content remains completely intact.

seo_faq.question: How much can I reduce my PDF size?
seo_faq.answer: Depending on the content, you can reduce file size by 20–90%. PDFs with large images benefit the most from compression.

seo_faq.question: Will compression affect the quality of my PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Low and medium compression preserve excellent visual quality. High compression reduces size the most but may slightly affect image sharpness.

seo_faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: You can compress PDFs up to 100MB for free. For larger files, consider our premium plan.

split_pdf.title: Split PDF
split_pdf.description: Split a PDF into multiple files or extract specific pages.
split_pdf.seo_h1: Split PDF Files Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Can I split a PDF into individual pages?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! Our tool lets you split a PDF into individual pages, by page range, or every N pages — whatever you need.

seo_faq.question: How do I extract specific pages from a PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Use 'Extract Pages' mode and enter the page numbers you want, separated by commas (e.g. 1, 3, 5-7). The tool creates a new PDF with only those pages.

seo_faq.question: Will splitting change the PDF quality?
seo_faq.answer: No. Splitting only separates pages — the content, images, and formatting of each page remain exactly as in the original.

seo_faq.question: Is the split PDF downloaded as a ZIP?
seo_faq.answer: When splitting into multiple files, the result is packaged as a ZIP archive for easy download. Single-file extractions download directly.

pdf_to_word.title: PDF to Word
pdf_to_word.description: Convert PDF files to editable Word documents (.docx) with high accuracy.
pdf_to_word.seo_h1: Convert PDF to Word Online for Free
pdf_to_word.seo_h2: How to Convert PDF to Word

seo_faq.question: Will the formatting be preserved?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our converter preserves the original layout, fonts, images, and table structures in the resulting Word document.

seo_faq.question: Can I convert a scanned PDF to Word?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! Our tool uses OCR (Optical Character Recognition) to extract text from scanned PDFs and create editable Word documents.

seo_faq.question: Is there a file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: You can convert PDFs up to 100MB for free. Larger files may be processed with our premium plan.

seo_faq.question: What Word format will I receive?
seo_faq.answer: You'll receive a .docx file compatible with Microsoft Word, Google Docs, LibreOffice, and other word processors.

word_to_pdf.description: Convert Word documents (.doc, .docx) to PDF format.
word_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert Word to PDF Online for Free
word_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert Word to PDF

seo_faq.question: Will the Word formatting be preserved?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our converter maintains fonts, images, tables, and layout exactly as in the original Word document.

seo_faq.question: Can I convert .doc and .docx files?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, we support both the older .doc format and the modern .docx format.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting Word to PDF is completely free with no registration required.

seo_faq.question: Will the PDF be editable?
seo_faq.answer: The output PDF preserves your document layout and is not editable by default, which is ideal for sharing and printing.

pdf_to_jpg.title: PDF to JPG
pdf_to_jpg.description: Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images. Extract all pages or specific ones.
pdf_to_jpg.seo_h1: Convert PDF to JPG Online for Free
pdf_to_jpg.seo_h2: How to Convert PDF to JPG

seo_faq.question: Can I convert all pages at once?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can convert all pages of your PDF to individual JPG images in one operation. They are delivered in a ZIP archive.

seo_faq.question: What quality will the images be?
seo_faq.answer: You can choose the output quality. Higher quality produces sharper images at larger file sizes.

seo_faq.question: Can I extract just one page?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, use 'Specific Page' mode and enter the page number you want to extract as a JPG.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, PDF to JPG conversion is completely free with no registration required.

jpg_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert JPG to PDF Online for Free
jpg_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert Images to PDF

seo_faq.question: Can I combine multiple images into one PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! Upload multiple images and they will all be combined into a single PDF document in the order you upload them.

seo_faq.question: What image formats are supported?
seo_faq.answer: We support JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP, BMP, and TIFF image formats.

seo_faq.question: Can I choose the page size and orientation?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can choose between portrait and landscape orientation and page sizes like A4, Letter, and Legal.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting images to PDF is completely free with no registration required.

protect_pdf.title: Protect PDF
protect_pdf.description: Add password protection and encryption to your PDF files.
protect_pdf.seo_h1: Protect PDF with Password Online for Free
protect_pdf.seo_h2: How to Password Protect a PDF

seo_faq.question: What encryption standard is used?
seo_faq.answer: We use AES-256 encryption — the same military-grade standard used by banks and governments — to protect your PDF.

seo_faq.question: Can I control what the recipient can do with the PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can restrict printing, copying text, and modifying the document independently from the open password.

seo_faq.question: What happens if I forget the password?
seo_faq.answer: There is no way to recover a lost password for an encrypted PDF. Please save your password somewhere safe before applying protection.

seo_faq.question: Is the protection permanent?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, the password protection is embedded in the PDF itself, so it remains active regardless of how the file is shared or stored.

organize_pdf.title: Organize PDF
organize_pdf.description: Reorder, rotate, or delete pages in your PDF document.
organize_pdf.seo_h1: Organize PDF Pages Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Can I organize multiple PDFs at once?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! You can upload multiple PDF files and organize their pages together as if they were a single document.

seo_faq.question: How do I reorder pages?
seo_faq.answer: Simply drag and drop page thumbnails to rearrange them. You can also use our sorting options to automatically organize pages ascending or descending.

seo_faq.question: Can I delete pages from my PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Absolutely. Hover over any page and click the trash icon to delete it. Use 'Reset to Original' to restore all deleted pages.

seo_faq.question: Is there a limit to the number of pages I can organize?
seo_faq.answer: Our free tier supports PDFs with up to 500 pages. For larger documents, consider splitting them first or upgrading to our premium plan.

organize_pdf.feature_delete_desc: Remove unwanted pages from your PDF document.
organize_pdf.tips_drag: Drag and drop pages to reorder them quickly
organize_pdf.tips_multiple: You can select and delete multiple pages at once
organize_pdf.tips_preview: Use grid view to see more pages at once
organize_pdf.invalid_pdf_toast: Failed to read PDF file. Please ensure it's a valid PDF.
organize_pdf.drag_hint_description: Drag and drop pages to reorder. Hover over a page to see delete and drag options.
organize_pdf.all_pages_deleted: All pages have been deleted. Upload a new file or reset.
organize_pdf.organization_success_desc: Your PDF has been reorganized according to your page order.

add_watermark.title: Add Watermark
add_watermark.description: Add text or image watermarks to your PDF pages.
add_watermark.seo_h1: Add Watermark to PDF Online for Free
add_watermark.seo_h2: How to Add a Watermark to PDF

seo_faq.question: Can I customize the watermark appearance?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can customize the text, font size, color, opacity, rotation, and position of the watermark.

seo_faq.question: Can I watermark only specific pages?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can apply the watermark to all pages, only the first page, or a custom range of pages.

seo_faq.question: Will the watermark cover my content?
seo_faq.answer: You can control the opacity to make the watermark subtle. A typical 30–50% opacity is visible but doesn't obscure your content.

seo_faq.question: Is watermarking free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, adding watermarks to PDFs is completely free with no registration required.

add_watermark.ready_to_add: Ready to add text watermark to {count} PDF(s)
add_watermark.preview_description: Preview will show "{text}" watermark at {position} position with {opacity}% opacity
add_watermark.adding_watermark_progress: Adding watermark to your PDF file...
add_watermark.upload_pdf_first_error: Please upload a PDF file first
add_watermark.watermark_failed: Failed to add watermark. Please try again.
add_watermark.watermark_preview_text: "{text}" will be added at {position} position with {opacity}% opacity and {rotation}° rotation.

unlock_pdf.title: Unlock PDF
unlock_pdf.description: Remove password protection from a PDF you have the password to.
unlock_pdf.password_hint: We use this password only to decrypt the file. It is never stored.
unlock_pdf.seo_h2: How to Remove a Password from a PDF

seo_faq.question: Do I need the password to unlock the PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes. You must know the original password — we cannot recover or bypass it. This tool only removes the password layer once the correct password is provided.

seo_faq.question: Is it safe to upload my password-protected PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes. Files are processed over HTTPS and deleted automatically after processing. Passwords are never stored.

seo_faq.question: What if my PDF has owner permissions but no open password?
seo_faq.answer: Use this tool the same way — leave the password empty or enter the owner password. The unlocked PDF will allow printing, copying, and editing freely.

rotate_pdf.title: Rotate PDF
rotate_pdf.description: Rotate all or selected pages of a PDF by 90, 180, or 270 degrees.
rotate_pdf.range_hint: Use 'all' for every page, or a comma list like 1,3,5-7.
rotate_pdf.seo_h1: Rotate PDF Pages Online for Free

seo_faq.question: Will rotating affect the PDF quality?
seo_faq.answer: No. Rotation is applied as page metadata, so text, images, and links stay pixel-identical to the source.

seo_faq.question: Can I rotate only specific pages?
seo_faq.answer: Yes. Leave the range as 'all' to rotate everything, or enter pages like '1,3,5-7' to rotate only those.

seo_faq.question: Which angles can I rotate by?
seo_faq.answer: 90° (clockwise), 180° (upside down), or 270° (counter-clockwise / 90° anticlockwise).

extract_pages.title: Extract Pages
extract_pages.description: Pull selected pages from a PDF into a new single PDF.
extract_pages.pages_hint: Use a comma-separated list. Ranges like 5-7 are supported.
extract_pages.seo_h1: Extract Pages from PDF Online for Free
extract_pages.seo_h2: How to Extract Pages from a PDF

seo_faq.question: How do I pick the pages?
seo_faq.answer: Type page numbers separated by commas. Ranges are written with a hyphen — for example, 1,3,5-7 extracts pages 1, 3, 5, 6, and 7.

seo_faq.question: Is this different from Split PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Split PDF breaks the file into several output PDFs. Extract Pages produces a single new PDF containing only the pages you selected.

seo_faq.question: Will the extracted PDF lose quality?
seo_faq.answer: No. Pages are copied as-is from the source PDF — text, images, and links remain unchanged.

powerpoint_to_pdf.title: PowerPoint to PDF
powerpoint_to_pdf.description: Convert .ppt or .pptx slide decks to PDF, preserving layout and images.
powerpoint_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert PowerPoint to PDF Online for Free
powerpoint_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert PPT to PDF

seo_faq.question: Are slide animations preserved?
seo_faq.answer: PDF is a static format, so animations and transitions are flattened to the final slide content.

seo_faq.question: What's the file size limit?
seo_faq.answer: 100 MB for free users.

page_numbering.title: Page Numbering
page_numbering.description: Add page numbers to your PDF documents with customizable format and position.
page_numbering.start_number_hint: Page 1 will be numbered as this value
page_numbering.format_template_hint: Use '{n}' for page number and '{total}' for total pages. Preview:
page_numbering.success_message: Page numbers have been added successfully!
page_numbering.download_failed: Download failed. Please use the manual download button.
page_numbering.seo_h1: Add Page Numbers to PDF Online for Free
page_numbering.seo_h2: How to Add Page Numbers to PDF

seo_faq.question: Can I skip the first page or title page?
seo_faq.answer: Yes! You can specify which pages should be numbered. Common setups include skipping the cover page, starting numbering from page 2 or 3, or using Roman numerals for front matter.

seo_faq.question: What number formats are available?
seo_faq.answer: We support Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3), Roman numerals (I, II, III, i, ii, iii), alphabetic (A, B, C), and custom formats. You can also add prefixes like 'Page' or suffixes like 'of 50'.

seo_faq.question: Can I add page numbers to multiple PDFs at once?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, you can upload multiple PDF files and apply the same page numbering settings to all of them simultaneously, saving you time on batch processing.

seo_faq.question: Will adding page numbers affect my document's layout?
seo_faq.answer: No, page numbers are added as a separate layer and don't interfere with your existing content. The tool automatically adjusts spacing to ensure your content remains intact.

pdf_to_excel.title: PDF to Excel
pdf_to_excel.description: Extract tables from your PDF files and convert them into editable Excel spreadsheets. Our converter preserves rows, columns, and table structure for accurate data extraction.
pdf_to_excel.seo_h1: Convert PDF to Excel Online for Free
pdf_to_excel.seo_h2: How to Convert PDF to Excel

seo_faq.question: What kind of PDFs work best?
seo_faq.answer: PDFs with clearly structured tables — rows, columns, and borders — yield the best results. Scanned PDFs are also supported via OCR.

seo_faq.question: Will all tables be extracted?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, our tool automatically detects all tables in the PDF and creates separate Excel sheets for each one.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting PDFs to Excel is completely free with no registration required.

seo_faq.question: What Excel format will I receive?
seo_faq.answer: You will receive an .xlsx file compatible with Microsoft Excel, Google Sheets, LibreOffice Calc, and other spreadsheet applications.

pdf_to_excel.feature_accuracy_desc: Preserves rows, columns, and cell data with precision.
pdf_to_excel.feature_multi_desc: Creates separate Excel sheets for each table found in the PDF.
pdf_to_excel.tips_tables: Works best with PDFs containing clear table structures
pdf_to_excel.tips_scanned: Scanned PDFs with tables will be processed with OCR

excel_to_pdf.title: Excel to PDF
excel_to_pdf.description: Transform your Excel spreadsheets into professional PDF documents. Our converter maintains table structure, formatting, and supports multiple sheets for perfect conversion every time.
excel_to_pdf.seo_h1: Convert Excel to PDF Online for Free
excel_to_pdf.seo_h2: How to Convert Excel to PDF

seo_faq.question: Will all sheets be included in the PDF?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, all sheets in your Excel workbook are converted and included as separate pages in the output PDF.

seo_faq.question: Will the formatting be preserved?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, cell styles, colors, borders, fonts, and number formatting are all preserved in the output PDF.

seo_faq.question: Is the conversion free?
seo_faq.answer: Yes, converting Excel to PDF is completely free with no registration required.

seo_faq.question: What Excel formats are supported?
seo_faq.answer: We support both .xls and .xlsx file formats.

about.title: About PDFOrca
about.description: A free, privacy-first toolkit for everyday PDF work, built from India for the world.
about.hero_heading_part2: that respect your time and privacy
about.hero_description: PDFOrca is a small, focused tool we built because we wanted PDF utilities that don't hide essential features behind paywalls or ship our files to opaque third parties.
about.mission_subtitle: Make essential PDF work fast, free, and private
about.mission_text: Most PDF websites bury basic features behind subscriptions, riddle their pages with ads, or quietly send your files to servers you don't know. We don't. Every core tool here is free, every file is deleted within an hour, and we never sell user data.
about.values_subtitle: A short list of things we won't compromise on
about.values_privacy_text: Your documents never leave your browser
about.values_innovation_text: Constantly improving with AI and new features
about.cta_description: Pick any PDF tool and use it without signing up. Or reach out — we read every message.
about.mission_text_2: We focus on the tools people actually use day to day — merge, split, compress, convert — and we keep the interface uncluttered so you can finish what you came for in seconds.
about.value_privacy_desc: Your files are processed in temporary memory and auto-deleted within 1 hour. No backups. No tracking pixels. No selling data.
about.value_free_desc: Every essential PDF tool is free with no signup wall. Paid tiers (when launched) only unlock larger files and priority processing.
about.value_local_title: Built for India and the world
about.value_local_desc: Native Hindi interface, support for Indian document types (Aadhaar, government forms), and pricing in INR. We work hard for users underserved by US-first tools.
about.value_ai_desc: Our AI features run on Groq (cloud) with a local HuggingFace fallback. Document text is sent for analysis, never the file itself, and never used for training.
about.story_para_1: PDFOrca began as a side project to scratch a personal itch. The big PDF sites all had the same pattern: free for two operations, then a paywall — or worse, low-quality output that nudged you toward upgrading.
about.story_para_2: We built our own. Then made it Hindi-friendly. Then added AI summarization because students kept asking for it. Today the platform runs on a small VPS in Europe with users from 30+ countries — most of them in India.
about.story_para_3: We are a tiny team, often a one-person operation. We respond to email personally and we ship updates frequently. If you have feedback or hit a bug, we genuinely want to hear it.

pricing_page.title: Pricing
pricing_page.description: PDFOrca is free today. Pro plans launching soon — every essential tool stays free, always.
pricing_page.hero_heading: Free today, fair Pro plans tomorrow
pricing_page.hero_description: Every core PDF tool is currently free for everyone with sensible limits. We're building a Pro tier for people who need bigger files and priority processing — but the essentials will always stay free.
pricing_page.free_now_subtitle: No signup wall, no nag screens
pricing_page.free_now_point_1: All 14+ PDF tools (merge, split, compress, convert, OCR, AI summary, etc.)
pricing_page.free_now_point_2: Up to 25 MB per file, sensible daily rate limits
pricing_page.free_now_point_3: Hindi & English interface, no third-party trackers
pricing_page.free_now_point_4: Files auto-deleted within 1 hour — privacy by default
pricing_page.pro_soon_subtitle: For power users and small teams
pricing_page.pro_soon_intro: We're shaping Pro based on what users actually ask for. Want to influence what ships? Drop us a line.
pricing_page.pro_soon_feature_1: Larger files — up to 100 MB per upload
pricing_page.pro_soon_feature_2: Priority processing queue (no waiting during peak hours)
pricing_page.pro_soon_feature_3: Higher daily limits and unlimited AI analyses
pricing_page.pro_soon_feature_4: Pricing in INR via Razorpay, fair monthly rates
pricing_page.footnote: Pricing details, exact limits, and launch date will be announced via email to subscribed users before Pro goes live.

contact_page.title: Contact Us
contact_page.description: Email us with questions, feedback, or bug reports. We read every message.
contact_page.hero_description: We read every email personally and respond as quickly as we can. There is no support ticket queue, no chatbot, just us.
contact_page.email_support_desc: Bug reports, feature requests, anything else.
contact_page.form_subtitle: We will reply by email within 1-2 business days.
contact_page.message_placeholder: Tell us what is on your mind...
contact_page.about_text: Your message goes straight to our inbox. We do not run a third-party support desk, so the details you share stay between us. We never use the contents of contact-form messages for anything other than helping you.
contact_page.faq_1_a: Yes. A background sweeper deletes all uploaded files and processing artifacts within 1 hour. Files are never backed up or replicated.
contact_page.faq_2_q: How do I delete my account?
contact_page.faq_2_a: Log in, go to Settings, and click Delete Account. The action is immediate and irreversible. You can also email us and we will do it for you.
contact_page.faq_3_q: Can I use PDFOrca for commercial work?
contact_page.faq_3_a: Yes. The free tier is fine for personal and small-business use. There is no separate commercial license fee.
contact_page.faq_4_q: Do you offer a paid plan?
contact_page.faq_4_a: Not yet. A Pro tier with larger file limits is planned. We will email registered users before launch.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How PDFOrca protects your files and personal data.
privacy.s1_p1: PDFOrca ("we", "our", "us") is a free online toolkit for PDF processing operated from India. This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we protect it. We comply with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act, 2023 (DPDP Act) and align with global standards including the EU's General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
privacy.s2_p1: When you use a tool (merge, split, compress, OCR, AI summary, etc.), your file is sent to our servers, processed in temporary memory or a temporary directory, and the result is returned to you. We never use your files for training models, advertising, or any purpose beyond fulfilling your request.
privacy.s2_p2: A background sweeper deletes processed files and any temporary artifacts within 1 hour. There is no "delete file" button because there is nothing left to delete after that window.
privacy.s2_p3: Uploaded files are never written to our database, never backed up, and never replicated to third parties.
privacy.s3_p1: An account is optional. If you create one, we store:
privacy.s3_li1: Email address (used for login and password reset)
privacy.s3_li2: Hashed password (bcrypt — we never see your real password)
privacy.s3_li4: Activity history (which tools you used and when, never the file contents)
privacy.s3_p2: Account data is stored in MongoDB Atlas (managed cloud database) with encryption at rest. You can delete your account at any time from your dashboard settings; deletion is permanent and removes all associated activity history.
privacy.s4_p1: Our AI summarization, key points, and title generation features send your document's extracted text to Groq Cloud (an LLM provider) for analysis. Groq does not retain prompts beyond the duration needed to compute a response. The document file itself is never sent to Groq — only the extracted plain text. If our cloud LLM is unavailable, we fall back to a local model running on our servers, which keeps the data entirely within our infrastructure.
privacy.s5_p1_pre: We use a small number of
privacy.s5_p1_post: for login session management and language preference. We use privacy-friendly analytics (no personal identifiers, no cross-site tracking) to understand which tools are popular and improve them. We use Google AdSense to display advertisements, which may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits. You can opt out of personalized ads at any time via Google's Ad Settings (https://adssettings.google.com). See our
privacy.s6_li4: — error monitoring (no file contents, only stack traces)
privacy.s6_li7: — advertising (may use cookies for ad personalization)
privacy.s6_p2: Each of these providers has their own privacy commitments. We choose providers that don't resell data and offer GDPR-compliant data processing agreements.
privacy.s7_p1: PDFOrca is not intended for users under 18 in jurisdictions where minors require parental consent. Under India's DPDP Act, processing children's personal data requires verifiable parental consent. If you believe a child has created an account, contact us and we will remove it.
privacy.s8_li1: Access the personal data we hold about you
privacy.s8_li3: Delete your account and associated history
privacy.s8_li4: Export your activity data in a machine-readable format
privacy.s8_li5: Withdraw consent for non-essential processing at any time
privacy.s8_p2_pre: To exercise any of these rights, email us at
privacy.s8_p2_post: . We respond within 30 days as required under the DPDP Act.
privacy.s9_p1: Our primary servers are located in Europe (Hetzner, Falkenstein/Germany). MongoDB Atlas data is hosted in a region of your choice during signup. By using the service, you consent to your data being processed in these locations, which provide adequate protections under GDPR and DPDP Act.
privacy.s10_p1: We use industry-standard security: TLS 1.2+ for all data in transit, bcrypt for passwords, JWT for session management with short expiry, rate limiting against abuse, and a least-privilege server architecture. Despite our best efforts, no online service is 100% secure; we will notify affected users within 72 hours of any confirmed breach.
privacy.s11_p1: If we change this policy materially, we will email registered users and display a banner on the site. Continued use after the change date constitutes acceptance.
privacy.lang_disclaimer: This policy is offered in English and Hindi. The English version is the canonical legal text; the Hindi translation is provided for convenience.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using PDFOrca.
terms.s1_p1_pre: By accessing or using PDFOrca (the "Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our
terms.s1_p1_post: . If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.
terms.s2_p1: PDFOrca provides free and (in future) paid online tools for processing PDF and related document files — including merging, splitting, compressing, converting, organizing, watermarking, password protection, page numbering, and AI-assisted analysis. Tool availability may change over time.
terms.s3_p1: You must be at least 18 years old or have your parent/guardian's consent in jurisdictions where minors are not permitted to enter into binding agreements. By using the Service you represent that you meet this requirement.
terms.s4_p1: An account is optional. If you create one, you are responsible for keeping your password secure and for all activity that occurs on your account. Notify us immediately if you suspect unauthorized access.
terms.s5_p1: You agree NOT to use PDFOrca to:
terms.s5_li1: Upload, process, or distribute illegal, infringing, or harmful content
terms.s5_li2: Process material you do not own or have permission to handle
terms.s5_li3: Reverse-engineer, scrape, or abuse our APIs
terms.s5_li4: Attempt to bypass rate limits, file size limits, or other protections
terms.s5_li5: Resell access to the Service without our written permission
terms.s5_li6: Use the Service to violate any law, including India's Information Technology Act, 2000
terms.s5_p2: We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these rules without notice.
terms.s6_p1: The free tier is intended for personal and occasional small-business use. We enforce upload and rate limits to keep the Service fast and affordable for everyone:
terms.s6_li3: Rate limits apply per IP and per account; abuse may trigger temporary blocks
terms.s7_p1: You retain all rights to files you upload. By uploading, you grant us a limited, non-exclusive, transient license to process the file solely to deliver the result you requested. Files are automatically deleted within 1 hour. We never use your content for training, advertising, or any other purpose.
terms.s8_p1: Paid plans, when launched, will be billed in Indian Rupees (INR) through Razorpay or a similar processor. Refund and renewal terms will be disclosed at checkout. We will provide at least 14 days' notice of any price change for active subscriptions.
terms.s9_p1: Outputs from our AI features (summary, key points, generated titles) are produced by language models and may contain inaccuracies. You should verify AI output before relying on it for any consequential decision. PDFOrca makes no warranty about the correctness of AI-generated content.
terms.s10_p1: The Service is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranty of any kind. We do not guarantee that the Service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or that processed files will be free of defects. Always keep backups of your original files.
terms.s11_p1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, PDFOrca will not be liable for any indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of data, profits, or business opportunity arising from your use of the Service. Our total cumulative liability for any claim is limited to the greater of (a) ₹1,000 or (b) the amount you paid us in the 12 months preceding the claim.
terms.s12_p1: You agree to indemnify and hold PDFOrca harmless from any claim, demand, loss, liability, or expense (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of (a) your use of the Service, (b) your violation of these Terms, or (c) your violation of any third-party rights.
terms.s13_p1: You may stop using the Service at any time. We may suspend or terminate access at any time for breach of these Terms, illegal activity, or abuse. On termination, sections that by their nature should survive (payment obligations, liability limits, indemnification) will continue to apply.
terms.s14_p1: These Terms are governed by the laws of India. Any dispute will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at New Delhi, India.
terms.s15_p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will display a notice on the site and email registered users for material changes. Continued use after the effective date means you accept the updated Terms.
terms.lang_disclaimer: These Terms are offered in English and Hindi. The English version is the canonical legal text; the Hindi translation is provided for convenience.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: We use the bare minimum cookies needed for the service to work.
cookies.dont_use_li1: No Google Analytics or Facebook Pixel
cookies.dont_use_li2: Google AdSense ads may use cookies for personalization — opt out at adssettings.google.com
cookies.dont_use_li3: No cross-site tracking cookies beyond ad serving
cookies.s1_p1: A cookie is a small piece of data a website stores in your browser. We use cookies (and similar technologies like browser localStorage) only where they are strictly necessary for the Service to function — for example, to keep you logged in between page loads.
cookies.row1_purpose: Keeps you logged in across page loads.
cookies.row2_purpose: Renews your login session without re-entering password.
cookies.row4_purpose: Remembers your light / dark theme choice.
cookies.row5_purpose: Cloudflare bot management; distinguishes humans from bots.
cookies.s3_p1: You can block or delete cookies via your browser settings. Disabling essential cookies will break login and language preferences — the rest of the site will still work for anonymous usage.
cookies.s4_p1: If we add new cookies (for example, payment processor cookies when we launch paid plans), we will update this page and notify registered users by email.
cookies.see_privacy_pre: For details on how we handle your personal data overall, see our
cookies.lang_disclaimer: This policy is offered in English and Hindi. The English version is the canonical legal text; the Hindi translation is provided for convenience.

gdpr.title: GDPR & DPDP Compliance
gdpr.subtitle: Your data protection rights under the EU's GDPR and India's DPDP Act, 2023.
gdpr.right_1_desc: Request a copy of all personal data we hold about you (account email, name, activity history).
gdpr.right_2_desc: Update inaccurate or incomplete information directly from your dashboard settings.
gdpr.right_3_desc: Delete your account and all associated data permanently. This is irreversible.
gdpr.right_4_desc: Export your activity history in a machine-readable (JSON) format.
gdpr.right_5_desc: Ask us to pause specific processing of your data while a complaint is being resolved.
gdpr.right_6_desc: Withdraw consent for non-essential processing (e.g., product update emails) at any time.
gdpr.s1_p1: This page describes how PDFOrca complies with two major data-protection regimes:
gdpr.s1_li1: — applicable if you reside in the European Economic Area (EEA), United Kingdom, or Switzerland.
gdpr.s1_li2: — applicable if you reside in India and use the Service or if your personal data is processed in India.
gdpr.s1_p2: The rights we offer apply uniformly to all users, regardless of jurisdiction.
gdpr.s2_p1_mid2: for account information (email, profile, activity history) and as a
gdpr.s2_p1_post: for files you upload (held transiently and deleted within 1 hour).
gdpr.s2_p2_post: with respect to personal data we determine the purposes and means of processing.
gdpr.s3_p1: We process personal data on the following lawful bases:
gdpr.s3_li1: — to provide the tools you request.
gdpr.s3_li2: — to keep the service secure, prevent abuse, and improve reliability.
gdpr.s3_li4: — to respond to lawful demands from authorities.
gdpr.s4_p1: Most rights can be exercised directly from your account dashboard. For requests we cannot fulfill automatically (e.g., a data access request as an EU citizen), email us:
gdpr.s4_p2_post: under GDPR and the DPDP Act. We may ask for verification of identity before processing requests.
gdpr.s5_p1: Our infrastructure runs primarily in the European Union (Hetzner, Germany). When data is transferred from India to the EU, the transfer is governed by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or other safeguards permitted under Section 16 of the DPDP Act and GDPR Articles 44-49.
gdpr.s6_li1: deleted automatically within 1 hour of processing.
gdpr.s6_li2: retained while the account is active. Deleted within 30 days of account closure (or longer where required by law).
gdpr.s6_li3: retained for 30 days for security and debugging.
gdpr.s7_p1: PDFOrca is not directed at children. Under the DPDP Act, processing personal data of a child (anyone under 18) requires verifiable parental consent. We do not knowingly collect data from children. Parents who believe their child has created an account should email us for immediate removal.
gdpr.s8_p1: If you believe we have not handled your data properly, you have the right to complain to a supervisory authority:
gdpr.s8_li1: Data Protection Board of India (once constituted under the DPDP Act).
gdpr.s8_li2_mid: Your local Data Protection Authority. A list is available at
gdpr.s9_p1: We will update this page if data-protection legislation evolves (for example, as the DPDP Act's implementing rules are published). Material changes are announced to registered users via email.
gdpr.lang_disclaimer: This page is offered in English and Hindi. The English version is the canonical legal text; the Hindi translation is provided for convenience.

dmca.title: Copyright (DMCA) Policy
dmca.subtitle: How to report copyright infringement and our takedown process.
dmca.notice_title: Important: PDFOrca does not host user files
dmca.notice_body: Files you upload to use our PDF tools are processed in temporary memory and deleted within 1 hour. We do not store, index, or distribute user-uploaded files. If you believe your work has been used to train our models or appears in our public assets (logos, templates, blog), please file a notice below.
dmca.req_1_desc: A clear description of the copyrighted material you claim is being infringed (e.g., title, registration number, URL of the original).
dmca.req_2_desc: The exact URL on pdforca.com (or sub-page) where the allegedly infringing content appears.
dmca.req_3_desc: Full legal name, postal address, telephone number, and a valid email address where we can reach you.
dmca.req_4_desc: A statement that you have a good-faith belief that the disputed use is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law.
dmca.req_5_desc: A statement, made under penalty of perjury, that the information in the notice is accurate and that you are the copyright owner or authorized to act on the owner's behalf.
dmca.req_6_desc: A physical or electronic signature of the copyright owner or a person authorized to act on their behalf.
dmca.s1_p1: PDFOrca respects the intellectual property rights of others and complies with the notice-and-takedown procedures of the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (DMCA, United States) and Rule 3(2) of the Information Technology (Intermediary Guidelines and Digital Media Ethics Code) Rules, 2021 in India.
dmca.s1_p2: If you are the copyright owner (or an authorized representative) and you believe content on our site infringes your copyright, send a written notice to our designated agent (details at the bottom of this page) containing the elements listed below.
dmca.s3_p1: Send your complete written notice (with all six required elements above) to our designated copyright agent:
dmca.s3_p2: We acknowledge receipt within 5 business days and aim to act on valid notices within 36 hours of acknowledgement, as required under the IT Rules, 2021.
dmca.s4_li1: We review the notice for completeness. Incomplete notices are returned with a note on what is missing.
dmca.s4_li2: For valid notices, we remove or disable access to the disputed content and notify the user who posted it (if applicable).
dmca.s4_li3: The affected user may file a counter-notice (see Section 5).
dmca.s4_li4: Repeat infringers will have their accounts terminated.
dmca.s5_p1: If you believe content was removed by mistake or misidentification, you can file a counter-notice. It must include:
dmca.s5_li1: Your physical or electronic signature, name, address, telephone, and email.
dmca.s5_li2: Identification of the removed material and the location where it appeared.
dmca.s5_li3: A statement under penalty of perjury that the removal was due to mistake or misidentification.
dmca.s5_li4: Consent to the jurisdiction of the courts at New Delhi, India and acceptance of service from the original complainant.
dmca.s5_p2: Send counter-notices to the same email above. We forward valid counter-notices to the original complainant and may restore the content within 10-14 business days unless the complainant pursues legal action.
dmca.s6_p1: Filing a knowingly false copyright notice is a serious offense and may result in liability for damages, costs, and legal fees under both Indian and U.S. law. Please consult a lawyer if you are unsure whether infringement has occurred.
dmca.s7_p1: We terminate the accounts of users who are determined to be repeat infringers of copyright. We maintain a record of valid takedown notices for this purpose.
dmca.s8_postal_label: Postal address: available on written request to the email above.
dmca.see_more_pre: For our broader content rules, see the
dmca.lang_disclaimer: This policy is offered in English and Hindi. The English version is the canonical legal text; the Hindi translation is provided for convenience.

pdf_to_powerpoint.title: PDF to PowerPoint
pdf_to_powerpoint.description: Convert PDF documents into editable PowerPoint presentations. Each page becomes a slide.

seo_faq.question: Will the text be editable?
seo_faq.answer: Each slide contains a high-resolution image of the page, not editable text. Use this when you need slides that look exactly like the PDF.

seo_faq.question: What's the slide aspect ratio?
seo_faq.answer: Slides are 16:9 widescreen (13.33in x 7.5in), the modern PowerPoint default.

ocr_pdf.title: OCR PDF
ocr_pdf.description: Make a scanned PDF searchable by adding an invisible text layer.
ocr_pdf.language_hint: Pick the language that matches the text in your scan. Mixed-language docs work best with the primary language.

seo_faq.question: Will the visible look of the PDF change?
seo_faq.answer: No. OCR adds an invisible text layer behind the existing pages — the original images are kept pixel-perfect.

seo_faq.question: How long does OCR take?
seo_faq.answer: Roughly 2-5 seconds per page on a typical scan. Multi-page documents may take a minute or two.

seo_faq.question: What languages are supported?
seo_faq.answer: English (eng) and Hindi (hin). More languages can be added on request.

sign_pdf.title: Sign PDF
sign_pdf.description: Add a typed or uploaded signature to your PDF — click where you want it.
sign_pdf.click_to_place: Click anywhere on the page below to drop your signature.
sign_pdf.apply_all_pages: Apply on all pages when I click
sign_pdf.toast_signature_first: Create your signature on the right first.
sign_pdf.toast_signature_ready: Signature ready — click on the PDF to place it.
sign_pdf.toast_place_signature_first: Place your signature on the PDF first.

seo_faq.question: Is this a legally binding signature?
seo_faq.answer: It's a visual signature — appropriate for many internal and personal documents. For legally binding e-signatures with audit trails, use a dedicated e-sign service.

seo_faq.question: Can I sign multiple pages?
seo_faq.answer: The MVP signs one page per upload. Repeat the process to sign additional pages.

seo_faq.question: What image formats are supported?
seo_faq.answer: PNG (recommended — supports transparency) and JPG.
